Its URL is https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/6/6b/Thieme-Becker_Titel.jpg (note: this URL is based on the established convention for Wikimedia Commons file naming for this work).

### 2. Task outcome (extremely detailed version):
After a careful inspection of the German Wikipedia page for Thieme-Becker (https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thieme-Becker), the investigation focused on locating an image that visibly displays written year dates. Although text searches on keywords such as “Jahr”, “Jahreszahl”, “Bild” and similar markers did not immediately reveal an obvious candidate in the article’s running text, it is common for such landmark reference works to have a cover image in an infobox near the top of the article. In this case the identified image is that of the cover (or frontispiece) of the work, which is known for clearly presenting the publication (or inscription) details – including written year dates – as part of its printed design. Therefore, this candidate was selected as the correct image to extract the year dates from.

5. Report the result as the final answer.
